response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq that maps closely to the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent) and demonstrated architecture, testing, and TDD discipline align well with the stack. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and React exposure is present but not deep.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and Docker matching the primary stack
Active AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq directly matches the AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing frameworks, and open-source library authorship
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being a primary stack requirement
Vitest not mentioned by name (Jest/testing experience is implied but not confirmed)
Limited recent Kotlin/Java work for the secondary backend services requirement
